_comment: Intermediate hex values from the W3C eddsa-jcs-2022 test vectors, transcribed verbatim from the w3c/vc-di-eddsa TestVectors/eddsa-jcs-2022/ files (docHashJCS.txt, proofHashJCS.txt, combinedHashJCS.txt, sigHexJCS.txt). All values are lowercase hex with no trailing newline in the source. See README.md for provenance.
combined_hash_order: proof_config_hash || document_hash (proof config FIRST, per spec 3.3.4 step 3)
